From the South of the Lookout Tower grace, head northeast up the slope, then turn left to find 2x Golden Rune [1] x3 on the stretch leading to the tower.
Climb the ladders in the lookout tower for a chest at the top containing Hand Ballista and Ballista Bolt x5.
Return to South of the Lookout Tower and head north down the cliff. After dropping down, pick up a Rainbow Stone from the campsite.
Follow the downward slope north of the campsite to enter Earthbore Cave:
Head inside and activate the Earthbore Cave grace.
Avoid the crack in the floor that collapses when stepped on, and open the chest behind it for Pickled Turtle Neck x3.
Follow the tunnel to a Golden Rune [1].
Continue ahead to pick up Glowstone x5 and Kukri x8 from two corpses next to each other.
Drop down and kill the Runebear for Spelldrake Talisman and 2,600 runes.
Pick up the Smoldering Butterfly x5 and Trina's Lily at the end of the room.
Head back up the slope outside the cave, then follow the cliff edge above it northwest to a basin with the Faith-knot Crystal Tear.
Just south of the basin lies Demi-Human Forest Ruins:
Kill the Demi-Human Queen near the entrance for Demi-Human Queen's Staff and Crystal Burst.
Pick up Arteria Leaf x2 from the corpse near the queen.
Head down the cellar in the southernmost part of the ruins for a chest containing Shield of the Guilty
Among the flowers southeast of the ruins, you'll find Gold-Tinged Excrement x2 and String x5.
Head south from the patch of flowers to find a Golden Rune [2] next to some Miranda Blossoms.
Follow the dirt path south of the Miranda Blossoms to Morne Tunnel:
Drop down to the left of the lift for a Smithing Stone [1] on the wall.
Activate the Morne Tunnel grace at the bottom.
Climb the ladder at the end of the first room for a Smithing Stone [1] on the wall.
Head into the next room without falling, and pick up the Golden Rune [2] down the first set of stairs.
In the alcove just northeast of the rune is an outcrop with Smithing Stone [1].
Pick up the Smithing Stone [1] near the bottom of the stairs.
Follow the south tunnel to a hut with a Golden Rune [4] and a chest with Exalted Flesh.
Pick up the Somber Smithing Stone [1] behind the hut, then the Large Glintstone Scrap x2 in the nearby alcove.
In the area below the stairs in the previous room, you'll find a Smithing Stone [1] on the wall and Stanching Boluses on a corpse.
Follow the west tunnel to a large room. At the west end of it, you'll find a smaller room with Soft Cotton.
Pick up the 4x Smithing Stone [1], Somber Smithing Stone [1], and Arteria Leaf x2 in the large room.
On the wall to the right before the boss is a Somber Smithing Stone [1].
Kill the Scaly Misbegotten for Rusted Anchor and 2,000 runes.
From the Church of Pilgrimage, head south toward a stone arch against a cliff. Behind it lies the entrance to Tombsward Catacombs:
Head inside and grab the Tombsward Catacombs grace.
Requires 1 Stonesword Key: Unlock the imp seal for a corpse with Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [9].
Pick up Grave Glovewort [1] and Grave Glovewort [2] from the first room.
Go down the stairs for a Grave Glovewort [1] to the right and a Ghost Glovewort [1] in the back.
Pick up the Grave Glovewort [1] in the corridor.
Deactivate the fire-breathing pillar, then pick up the Human Bone Shard x5 on the ground.
In the room east of the pillar, you'll find a Grave Glovewort [2] and Prattling Pate "Thank you".
Activate the pillar while standing on top of it to reach the Golden Rune [2] on the ledge.
Pick up the Grave Glovewort [2] in front of a coffin, then pull the lever ahead.
Kill the Cemetery Shade for Lhutel the Headless and 2,200 runes.
Exit the catacombs and kill the Erdtree Avatar in front of the Minor Erdtree for Opaline Bubbletear, Crimsonburst Crystal Tear, and 3,600 runes.
Kill the Operatic Bat below the cliff past the Erdtree for a Golden Rune [6] (first time), then pick up the nearby Sliver of Meat.

Head west-northwest from the bats to a large ruin, then go north-northeast toward a stone arch and drop to the ledge below it. On a pillar below the ledge sits a corpse with Eclipse Crest Heater Shield.
Travel to the Tombsward grace and head north-northwest toward Tombsward Ruins:
Pick up Beast Liver next to a rat in the middle of the ruins.
Open the chest in the cellar to obtain Winged Scythe.
Kill the scarab at the top of the large ruin next to the ruins for Divine Fortification.
Requires 1 Stonesword Key: Unlock the evergaol west of the ruins, then kill the Ancient Hero of Zamor for Radagon's Scarseal and 5,400 runes.
On a lower ledge south of the evergaol lies the entrance to Tombsward Cave:
Go inside and grab the Tombsward Cave grace.
Pick up the Golden Rune [2] right before the poison swamp.
On the opposite end of the swamp is a Furlcalling Finger Remedy.
Follow the northeast tunnel past some rats to pick up Immunizing White Cured Meat and Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [8].
Head back and take the path on the right side to an Arteria Leaf on a ledge.
Drop down to find a corpse in the poison with Poisonbone Dart x6.
Kill Miranda the Blighted Bloom for Viridian Amber Medallion and 2,100 runes.
Exit the cave and take down the Wandering Mausoleum by hacking away at the skull formations on its feet until it collapses.
In the area next to the slope that leads to the church lies Witchbane Ruins:
Pick up Great Dragonfly Head from a corpse in the back of the ruins.
Head down the cellar to find Ambush Shard next to Sellen's body.
Head south from the cellar to discover a cemetery on your left with 4x Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], and a Golden Rune [3].
On top of the slope northeast of the cemetery, in front of some gibbets, you'll find Great Dragonfly Head x3.
Drop below the cliff southeast of the gibbets to discover a corpse in a chair with Mushroom x4.
Return to the gibbets and climb the lookout tower to open the trap chest at the top. After arriving, grab the Divine Bridge grace just ahead.
Open the chest to the right of the Golem for the Blessed Dew Talisman.
Travel to Castle Morne Rampart and use the nearby spiritspring while facing south to reach the top of a tower with Great Turtle Shield and Warming Stone x2.
An astrolabe with Starlight Shards sits at the cliff edge east of the tower.
Head toward Oridys's Rise and examine the book in front of it. You'll need to hit three "Wise Beasts" to gain entry:
#1: In a bush to the left of the stairs. In front of you as you interact with the book. [Location 1]
#2: On the road leading to the tower. Just look behind you after interacting with the book. [Location 2]
#3: In the pond to the right of the tower. This one is invisible so aim where the water splashes. [Location 3]
Enter the tower and loot the chest at the top to obtain a Memory Stone.
Exit the tower and go north to find the Beside the Crater-Pocked Glade grace next to a ruin.
Head north past the craters until you reach the cliff's edge, where you'll find a corpse in a chair with Stonesword Key.
Down the slope below the cliff southeast of the chair lies the entrance to Impaler's Catacombs:
Head inside to grab the Impaler's Catacombs grace.
On a coffin in the first room is a Grave Glovewort [1].
Follow the path straight ahead to a Grave Glovewort [2].
Momentarily step inside the room down the other path. When the floor rises to impale you, drop down beneath it for a Ghost Glovewort [2].
Loot the Grave Glovewort [2], Prattling Pate "Please Help", Root Resin x3, and 2x Grave Glovewort [1] from the sewage area with respawning enemies.
Climb the ladder in the back, pull the lever, and pick up the Grave Glovewort [2] in the corner guarded by an Imp.
Kill the Erdtree Burial Watchdog for Demi-Human Ashes and 2,400 runes.
Travel to Castle Morne Rampart, pass time until nightfall, and kill the Night's Cavalry there for Ash of War: Barricade Shield, Nightrider Flail, and 3,400 runes.
Head southwest through the rampart and kill the Deathbird behind a large ruin for Sacrificial Axe and 3,900 runes.
Continue southwest toward a beach to find a Golden Rune [1] in front of a gibbet.
Enter Castle Morne and activate the Castle Morne Lift grace.
